items.title: The Grizzlies' roster is crowded. Cedric Coward and Zach Edey are building blocks. Ja Morant is ... available. What about the rest?
items.author: Chris Herrington
items.body_excerpt:
The Grizzlies' roster is crowded. Cedric Coward and Zach Edey are building blocks. Ja Morant is ... available. What about the rest? 

A look at some looming decisions, led by potential contract discussions this summer with GG Jackson and Jaylen Wells.

dailymemphian.com/subscriber/s...

media.title: Herrington: Why GG Jackson, Jaylen Wells could sign new Grizzlies contracts this summer
media.description: Beyond Cedric Coward, Zach Edey and Ja Morant, there are decisions to be made about the rest of the roster, and the clock’s ticking.
